name: Classroom Teaching Staff
code: Educators responsible for planning and delivering lessons.
description: Class teachers, subject specialists, SEN teachers

name: Senior Leadership Team (SLT)
code: Strategic oversight and school-wide decision makers.

name: Administrative Services Staff
code: Handles day-to-day operations, communications, and clerical tasks.

name: Operational Support Staff
code: Staff who provide essential logistical and technical support.
description: Site managers, IT technicians, catering, cleaning staff

name: Classroom Support Staff
code: Direct classroom assistants supporting teaching and pupil progress.
description: Teaching Assistants, Learning Support Assistants, SEN Support

name: Student Teaching Staff
code: Staff undergoing training placements, often supervised by mentors.

name: Pastoral Care Team
code: Oversees student well-being, behaviour, and safeguarding.

name: Inclusion & SEND Team
code: Manages special educational needs and inclusion initiatives.

name: Extracurricular Coordinators
code: Facilitates after-school programs, clubs, and enrichment activities.
description: Sports coaches, music instructors, club leads

name: Governance & Compliance
code: Ensures regulatory alignment, inspections, and policy frameworks.

name: Early Years Foundation Staff
code: Staff dedicated to nursery and reception-level education.
